evidence: run_043 shows the bad tail regime is concentrated in pullback/charm-pin path behavior: two slow trades consumed 116.1 exposure hours, while protected fast winners overlap broad static features. Static filters such as gamma score >=0.5 retained only 84.1% PnL and call/put imbalance >=0.5 retained 77.6%.
name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
risk: Can overfit a handful of delayed recoveries or block clean extended-VWAP winners unless protected fast-winner UTC retention is explicitly validated.
trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long or charm_pin_pullback_long entries that fail to make meaningful positive progress before MAE in the first few minutes.
validation_metric: Remove slow >=12h trades, reduce worst MAE toward leader-family levels, retain >=90% pullback/charm-pin PnL, retain >=95% protected fast winners, and keep total score flat or better versus run_029.

evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY remains efficient in run_043 with 7 trades, $464.5 PnL, 145.99 PnL/exposure hour, no slow trades, and -327.25 worst MAE, while prior direct 1DTE tightening hurt score and net profit.
name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Split
risk: Router overlap may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades or the companion profile may be unreachable with current triggers.
trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL stays at or above current 1DTE baseline, 1DTE average/worst MAE improves, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL is measured, and total net profit remains >=98% of leader.
